cedict_en: to witness/to see at first hand/to see with one's own eyes
gaze; (fig.) attention/expression in one's eyes; look/(lit. and fig.) sight; vision
to bathe; to take a bath/(fig.) to be bathed in; to be immersed in
(a groaning sound) | (nonverbal grunt as interjection)/OK, yeah/what? | interjection indicating approval, appreciation or agreement
erhua variant of 納悶|纳闷[na4 men4]
